name: Fresh berries

ingredients.amount: about ⅓ cup / 50 g strawberries, halved or quartered
ingredients.item: about ⅓ cup / 50 g strawberries, halved or quartered
ingredients.original: about ⅓ cup / 50 g strawberries, halved or quartered

method: Preheat the oven to 170°C. Put the chocolate and butter in a bowl, set it over a pan of simmering water, and leave to melt. Whisk the egg and yolk with the sugar until thick and pale yellow, then fold the mixture into the melted chocolate.

If using the jam, put a spoonful in the base of each tartlet shell. Fill them up with the chocolate mix; it should reach right up to the rim. Place in the oven and bake for 5 minutes. Cool a little, then remove the tartlets from their pans and allow them to cool completely.
Lightly dust with cocoa powder and serve at room temperature.
